Still in his<br />hammock. He pulled his phone from the pocket of his jacket next to him. 3:17<br />am, 1 new message from an unknown number.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in; tab-stops: 12.0pt .5in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">-"ATTACK<br />IS IMMINENT!!!!”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash felt his senses come<br />alive, 25 years of drills and real life base attacks had drilled that message<br />into his DNA. His focus came alive, and his hearing and sight became acute. Ash<br />steadied his breath. He didn't move, not yet, he wanted to know what direction?<br /></span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">What attack? In Oregon?<br />Really? He started to assume that this was a prank being pulled by one of the<br />new cadets. He got out of the hammock and walked to the kitchen to get some<br />water. He still didn't feel right though.<br />Something was off. He placed the glass on the counter and… </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash heard the front door open and then close softly. It could be a<br />prank, and if so, he didn't want to accidentally shoot one of his students. At<br />the same time, that is not a message to be sent lightly. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">He quietly pulled a sidearm from the drawer, but holstered it in<br />the back of his sweat pants. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">He also grabbed his<br />favorite Shun Chef Knife from the butcher block on the counter.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ducking down behind the<br />island, he used the glass reflection to watch the hallway. Two men entered the<br />living room, geared up in all black, using professional hand signals. They<br />moved silently, and they were built for battle. These were no students. Ash<br />watched as they made their way to the porch, where his hammock still looked<br />like it was being slept in. Intended to fool students pulling a prank, but just<br />as handy when being attacked for real. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">He started to rise so that he could work his way to a better<br />defensive position, then a bright light made him pull back. He couldn't see<br />anything for a few moments. When the light cleared, he could see the men on the<br />porch as they approached the hammock, and then opened fire on it. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash pulled his sidearm out of his waistband. He took several shallow breaths, followed by one deep<br />breath, and steadied his focus. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">He could see the hammock,<br />and its contents falling apart. He stood, worked quickly to get behind the<br />couch, which he had specially made for<br />just such an occasion. Steel and Kevlar make a great barrier to hide behind.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">You never can be too<br />paranoid... or is that prepared? He could never tell the difference. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">He crouched behind, on one<br />knee, and set the knife on the floor. With both hands to steady his aim, he<br />fired several shots into the nearest target. The assailant flailed forward into<br />his counterpart and then went over the balcony. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Stunned by the commotion,<br />the other remaining member turned to see where the shots came from, too late. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash emptied the remaining<br />rounds and number two fell back, half over the railing himself. The weapon fell<br />to the floor.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash re-loaded the second clip<br />and approached with caution. He kicked the assailants’ weapon aside and checked for life. DOA. A glance over<br />the edge revealed no change of survival there either. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash grabbed the man's<br />rifle, slung it over his shoulder, and swept the house for more.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Who sent them? What in the<br />world did they want with a professor? Surely it can't be a grudge from his<br />Special Forces days? That was over eight years ago, then again, people like Ash<br />never really retire. They just go dormant, to be pulled back at a moment's notice. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Which is why he still had a<br />Commanding Office to report to quarterly. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">When he knew the coast was<br />clear, he called his C.O. to report the incident. No reason for the civilians<br />of this sleepy town to know that there had been a Russian attack on US Soil,<br />they'll send a sanitation team to make it look like it never happened. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"General Akbar… Sir<br />this can't be an isolated incident. I need to go dark and find out what's going<br />on." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Understood. Check<br />back in two weeks, and we'll see what we can find on our end. We'll let the<br />school know we called you into active duty on short-term<br />notice. They won't ask any questions. And Ash… be careful. I don’t like the<br />smell of this." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"I’m with you on that.<br />I'll check back in two weeks." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash threw together his<br />hiking pack and necessities. He pulled<br />his cash from the stowaway hidden in the<br />back of the couch. He took one last glance at his cabin, now a little less<br />beautiful than before… sighed, and walked out the door. The sanitation team<br />would be here before light. And he needed to be gone by then too. Ash pulled<br />the bike out from the garage. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">He didn't ride the Vulcan<br />often, but he really enjoyed it. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"I really do need to<br />get out more, even if it takes people looking to assassinate me to get me out<br />of town." At the sound of his voice, a small bird flew away from a nearby<br />tree. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">He glanced both directions.<br />There were redundancies in Washington and California, which only he knew about.<br />He didn’t even report these to his C.O.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Heck, let's make like<br />the birds and head south for the winter". </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash pointed the nose down<br />the road and took off. Making sure to<br />keep to back roads, but only those with multiple exit paths and trails he could<br />take the bike on if needed.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Morning came too early. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Dr. Briar checked for<br />messages from his team. Then he realized the mistake he’d made by sending that<br />final text.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">He was too late to do<br />anything about his people. The military authorities were already covering Ash's<br />house. They weren't really his people anyway, they were the Benefactor's. They were not loyal to him. They<br />were growing too comfortable.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">But what would the<br />Benefactor say? </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">It was always assumed that<br />something could go wrong during a termination; therefore, he had always taken<br />every precaution. Including paying his assistants in cash only, no paycheck to<br />tie them back to him. Texting apps with self-deleting timetables of 15 minutes.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">When he sent the text, he<br />thought Ash would see them coming and escape, not stay and take them out. But<br />it's fair game, and these two were not nice men. It might be nice to start<br />over.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Dr. Briar pulled up the<br />private Instant Message and began typing.<br /></span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in; tab-stops: 12.0pt .5in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">-Subject<br />A: Terminated</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in; tab-stops: 12.0pt .5in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">-Subject<br />B: Termination Failed, Escaped, On the run. font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; Oh, and hire two more<br />assistants, I seem to have lost mine."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Yes Sir Dr. Briar,<br />right away."&nbsp; He pressed the big red<br />button and re-holstered the phone. Clara,<br />even she was brought in by the Benefactor. Dr. Briar was not the owner of his<br />company anymore, just a cog in its wheel. She would process his termination<br />with the same pleasant disposition she used to order his coffee. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">He wondered if she would be<br />out here herself if Dr. Briar's unique<br />medical expertise were no longer deemed necessary.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">He sat in the cafe for a<br />few moments, pondering his next moves. mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">The Los Angeles Sky Mall<br />was bustling with humanity, roaming about like so many ants building a colony<br />without knowing why. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Eta sat in the food court<br />just outside the Chick-fil-A, overlooking the railing down to the first floor,<br />in perfect view of the lockers. She fiddled with a strand of recently purple<br />hair. She figured vacations were opportunities to try something new. She couldn't<br />get the latest vision out of her head. After that incident last week with the<br />Boston Marathon, she was officially freaking out. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Then this new vision<br />started up. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">She's sitting in this exact spot, and some guy in black jeans,<br />a black jacket with a Carhart logo, and a gray<br />beany, steps up to a locker, he turns around ... Vision Over.</span></i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"I'm not sure who this<br />guy is," she said out loud "...<br />all I know is, if he has any clues, about why I'm seeing stuff before it<br />happens, it's worth a shot to come find out." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Eta shook her head,<br />"You're talking to yourself again girl, get a grip…" </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">So she waits… and waits.<br />She's been here all day, every day, with her laptop surfing the Wi-Fi...<br />waiting. She's had only this vision, every night, for a week since the Boston<br />Bombing. So here she sits, waiting. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Day 8… hotels and fast<br />food. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Bouncing from site to site,<br />Google providing no solid answers, she's attempting to use the other search<br />engines, hoping for different results. She's hit up Bing, Yahoo, DuckDuckGo...<br />she's moved on to other searches. A black jacket<br />with a Carhart label on the shoulder, and a gray beany... he was headed in the direction of the lockers. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">She took a deep breath and<br />held it. Pulse quickened. Muscles tensed.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Eta tried to look casual,<br />in case he turned her direction. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">If Special Forces training<br />had taught her anything it was how to observe without being seen. He was headed<br />straight for the locker... and then passed it, and headed out of sight down the<br />halls to the bathrooms. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">She wouldn't have the time<br />to get down there and follow, and the vision was about this locker. She decided<br />against her inner desire to pursue and kept up with her searches. If that was<br />the guy, he'd be back. If it wasn't, she'd miss the real person she was here to<br />see. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">More searches turning interesting<br />tidbits of useless data. It's a decent distraction, but she's no closer to the<br />answer. Eta stares into the crowds below as they meander through the mall. Out<br />of the corner of her eye, she sees the<br />man again, walking away from the lockers. He disappears underneath her, toward<br />the exit. She debated, "Should I go follow, or stay and wait?" She<br />decides that the vision has her in this seat, and him at that locker. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Hello, Ms.?" </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Eta is startled by a young<br />man holding a heart shaped box. "Yes?" </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"This is for you, have<br />a great day", the young man starts to take off. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Wait, sir… this can't<br />be for me." He turns back to face her. "I don't know anyone here. You<br />got the wrong person." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"No Ma'am. You are the<br />one. He pointed to you, black leather jacket, laptop, purple hair. He said to<br />give this to you." he turned and walked away. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Eta looked around, she felt<br />the icy tingle run through her spine. She<br />could feel her breathing quicken, and her skin tighten. Glancing through the<br />crowd, she could not locate any immediate danger. Eta put her ear to the box to<br />listen for mechanical devices. It was light, too light to be a bomb. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">She opened it, and there<br />was a note inside. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Why did you open this<br />box? Haven't I taught you anything? Gotcha! Over Please." She recognized<br />the handwriting instantly. "Hey<br />there slugger! Almost didn't notice you there. What are you doing<br />here?"&nbsp; </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">It may have been eight<br />years, but they were partners for longer than that. She stood up, glancing<br />around. She didn't see him. She looked toward the locker, there he was. The man<br />in the black jacket pulled a backpack from the locker<br />and turned around. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Of all the crazy…<br />", she said. Her muscles relaxed. Eta folded her arms, feigning annoyance,<br />and nodded her head calling him over. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-no-proof: yes;">She</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;"> sat down. She took a deep<br />breath, and sighed. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">She watched him ride the<br />escalator. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">He's getting older, more<br />gray on the sides.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Therun “Ash” Ashland walked<br />up to her, smiling. He'd aged well. "Time has been hard on you, huh tough<br />guy?" </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"It's done wonders for<br />you, slugger. Look at you. Purple<br />huh?"</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">“Well… I was going for<br />blue, but since my hair is bright red, it came out more purple.” </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">“It looks good on you.” Ash<br />sat down and recanted his ordeal in<br />Oregon, and his trip down here to pull his backup safety stash of cash (can't<br />be hacked or tracked), weapons, and passports. The part about odd sightings was<br />unusual but made her feel better about<br />her condition.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">She recanted her<br />precognitions (she learned a new word while she was waiting) and experiences in<br />Colorado. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">When they had both finished<br />explaining their individual reason for being there, she sat back and blew a<br />strand of purple from her face.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Psychic precognition… huh?
