If you say so.”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">“If are having issues too…<br />could this be related to…”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;"><br /><br />“Maybe? Let’s not jump to any conclusions yet. What do you do next?" Ash<br />sat back in his chair.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"I don't know. I've<br />been searching for answers, Google has been most helpful. Did you know I could<br />have latent Psychic Tendencies?" She smiled. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Really?" Ash put<br />on his best serious face. "Well… let's get you your own program!"</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">They both chuckled.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"So Chief, what's the<br />plan now for you?"</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"I don't know, but I<br />do know I'll need someplace to crash tonight. Then I get a game plan<br />together."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"You mean we, right?"</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"I don't want to drag<br />you into my mess, I've got people after me."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"My precognition let<br />me straight to you. You'll need a partner watching your back. Looks like you're<br />stuck with me, old timer."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"You have any visions<br />of a 5-star hotel in our future? We can't<br />use credit cards, got to stay off the grid." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"No. The last vision<br />was of you standing there at that locker, of<br />course, I didn’t know it was you at the time. Fresh out of visions for<br />the moment... Wait… it's coming in<br />now…"</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash sat up a little<br />straighter, after his fight with the homeless man he was open to strange<br />possibilities. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"I see you, and me…<br />sleeping in a cardboard box!" She laughed. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash slouched a little and shook his head. "Well, we can't<br />stay here. But I think I can afford someplace better than a cardboard<br />box."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Calibri&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 11.0pt; mso-ansi-language: EN-US; mso-ascii-theme-font: minor-latin; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; mso-bidi-language: AR-SA; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-bidi; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Tempus Sans ITC&quot;; mso-fareast-language: EN-US; mso-hansi-theme-font: minor-latin;"><br clear="all" style="mso-special-character: line-break; page-break-before: always;" /><br /></span><br /><br /><br /><br /><div class="MsoNormal"><br /><br /></div><br /><h1><br /><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/null" name="_Toc458968200">Dissonance</a><o:p></o:p></h1><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">They went to Denny's for a<br />bite to eat. You can always count on Denny's when you are operating on a<br />budget. And when you don't know how long you'll need to stay off the grid, any<br />amount of cash needed to be budgeted.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Before they could make it<br />into the front door, Ash heard something, and motioned for Eta to follow,<br />making their way to the alley. As they rounded the corner they heard voices,<br />and they didn't sound pleasant. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Curiosity got the better of<br />Ash who peeked into the alley to assess<br />the situation. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Eta made a grumpy face but followed. "Ash" she<br />whispered, "we're trying to stay off the grid. Let's not get in the middle<br />of something we'll need to explain to the police."<br /></span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">He motioned to keep her<br />voice down and glanced around the corner.<br />Three… no four, Latino men, armed with handguns.<br />All dressed in sagging jean shorts, white ribbed undershirts, and button down plaid, with only the top button<br />together. Blue bandanas wrapped around<br />their arms.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Chester, Chester…<br />it's been a long time since we've seen you around. You ain't buying no more, or<br />what?" The smallest guy was doing the talking. Shaved head, snake tattoo<br />on his neck running up and over his skull. "You still owe us that program<br />you promised boy. The one that would get us into people's accounts. Where'd you<br />disappear to essay?!" </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Turning to the chunky guy<br />on his left, "Gordo, what's it been, two… three years since we've seen<br />this punk? Since he promised us a program in exchange for our merchandise? I<br />think it's time to pay up Sancha!" </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash could see the shadowy<br />figures rising up and around the four guys. Never quite solid, but so often<br />present. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Then a light caught his<br />eye. He noticed the gleam first, and then the whole scene exploded into bright<br />light. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash backed away,<br />temporarily blinded. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">After a few blinks, he<br />could see a very large man, brown hair, dressed in all white, with a gold belt<br />and long sword. He was standing behind the victim, but looking straight at Ash.<br /></span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Another large man, similar<br />to the first, stood beside him. He smiled, motioned to the four assailants,<br />nodded approval, then… both large men disappeared. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash motioned to Eta. Four<br />assailants. Armed. One victim. Cover me, from over there. I'm going in. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Eta pulled her sidearm, and sighed. "Really?" she<br />whispered, "I took vacation time to come to LA and shoot<br />gangsters?"&nbsp; </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Eta silently made her way<br />to just behind the parked car. She stayed in the shadows between a parked car<br />and the wall but kept her sidearm pointed at the group. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash adjusted his chest<br />holster within easy reach of his slightly open jacket<br />and walked down the alley.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">He walked right up next to<br />the largest of the bunch and stood there for a while. They were so busy being<br />idiots they didn't even notice him. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Amateurs. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Tired of being ignored;<br />"Fellas, what's with the<br />party!?" he screamed out with his best impression of a loud drunk. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-no-proof: yes;">Snakehead</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;"> whipped around, followed<br />by everyone else. Tiny looked the most surprised, considering Ash was standing<br />right next to him and he didn't notice. Snakehead<br />put on his best bravado stance. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"You lost Boracho? I think you need to move along… "<br /></span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Why? I was just<br />leaving the bar and my friend disappeared. I was looking all over for you<br />buddy, where did you go?" Motioning at the victim. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-no-proof: yes;">Snakehead</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;"> didn't give him time to<br />respond. "You have 60 seconds to leave<br />before you become a part of this party amigo… and trust me, you don't want to<br />be a part of this party." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">“Party! “Ash yelled. “I<br />like parties.” Ash straightened up a little, still putting on a drunk show.<br />"I'll tell you what amigo…." He swallowed, dramatically for show. "I'll give you and your friends 10<br />seconds to leave this alley before I ruin your party and take my friend with<br />me." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-no-proof: yes;">Snakehead</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;"> had enough; "Tiny…<br />get rid of this guy, huh?" Tiny pointed his gun at Ash's head… <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">…the world slowed down. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash moved into Tiny's space, pushed the gun hand away<br />from his body, stepped on the arch of his foot, and then pulled his knee into<br />the opposite inner thigh. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">He maneuvered the pistol<br />from Tiny’s hand, then hit him in the nose with the butt of the gun.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">With one big shove, he knocked Tiny into the guy behind him<br />and they both went down. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash whipped around, in two<br />quick strides and hit the third guy in the throat so hard that he dropped his<br />gun and went down to the ground with both hands on his neck trying to breathe. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Finally, he sidestepped to Snake Head, and with one hand<br />took Snake Head’s gun hand and held it pointed to the ground, and with the<br />other hand holding the gun he'd just taken from tiny, pointed it right between<br />his eyes. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">By this point two of the<br />assailants were still nursing wounds while the third had recovered and was<br />starting to point his weapon at Ash. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Just then the gun flew out<br />of the third guy's hand, and a faint<br />swoosh could be heard from down the alley. He grabbed his hand in immense pain<br />as it was now bleeding profusely.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash, no longer pretending<br />to be a drunk, looked Snake Head directly in the eye. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"So here's how this<br />goes. A) You and your friends leave your weapons in the alley and take your<br />friend to the hospital to have his hand looked at. B) You all leave here in<br />body bags as my friend back there picks you off like ducks at a carnival<br />shooting gallery."<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Snake Head hesitated for a<br />few moments, then dropped his gun. The four of them ran out of the alley, right<br />past Eta who stayed hidden so they wouldn't see where she'd fired from. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash picked up the weapons<br />and put on the safeties before loading two into his belt. He threw the others<br />to Eta who had come down the alley after<br />she was sure that the four had left for good.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"You're getting rusty old man."&nbsp; Eta half smiled. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">“And you’re still trigger<br />happy. That guy wasn’t going to shoot me when I’ve got a gun to his leader’s<br />temple.”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;"><br /><br />“You can’t know that. Street gangs are not known for their quick wit and logic.<br />Not in any country.”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">“Good point.”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">“Besides… I didn’t come out<br />here to lose you, I still need answers.”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash returned a smirk and<br />then turned to their new friend. "You have a name kid?" </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Chester…" he<br />managed, a bit shaken from the encounter.<br />“Kid. That's funny." Smiling, but still looking a bit dazed.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Well Chester, we'll<br />need to get moving before they gather the courage to return with the rest of<br />their gang, or police come after someone reports the commotion. Anyplace you<br />know that we can go and be safe for a bit?" Ash said.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"And maybe some<br />food?" Eta shrugged, "This kind of interrupted our dinner<br />plans."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Yeah… sure… this<br />way…" Chester motioned to the street and the three of them left the alley.<br /></span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-no-proof: yes;"><v:shape id="Picture_x0020_13" o:spid="_x0000_i1034" style="height: 25.5pt; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">They followed Chester on<br />the bike and made their way to the Union<br />Gospel Mission. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Chester waived to the night<br />guard, "Albert. These two are with me."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"OK, sounds good. Just<br />sign them in Mr. Chester." The guard was older, he looked like he could<br />hold his own, but he wasn't going on any marathons any time soon either. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Who were those<br />guys?" Eta asked as they ate a free meal. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"It's a long story.<br />Suffice it to say that they were part of a life I no longer live. By the way,<br />not that I'm not grateful… but where did you two learn to do that CIA, Kung Fu,<br />Ninja stuff back there?" </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Eta and Ash glanced at each<br />other and smiled. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"It's a long<br />story…" Ash smiled. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Chester smiled back.<br />"I see what you did there."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Eta kept her eyes on the<br />doors and windows. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Chester followed her<br />glance, "Well hey, seriously, if you want to avoid prying eyes, the<br />mission might not be the best place for you two to stay tonight. Most of the<br />residents are long-term bums and are still discussing the conspiracy<br />behind the Kennedy assassination, or Roswell. But we do get a few Savvys in now and then. If your faces are on<br />the news or anything, they might know. They'd take the opportunity for a tip<br />line reward." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Chester glanced at the wall<br />for a moment and turned back to them.<br />"If you don’t already have other plans, why don't you stay at my place<br />tonight? It's big enough."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Are you sure it's a<br />good idea to invite total strangers to your house,<br />Chester?" Ash put up his hands, "Not that I mind." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Listen. Strange you<br />are. Weird…. Maybe even a little scary. But two people who would walk into an<br />alley to save a guy they don't know with super cool Ninja moves, and then let<br />the crooks live? If you meant me harm, we wouldn't be here right now. Besides…<br />there's something about you… I can't put my finger on it, but I like you. I<br />always trust my gut. It’s always done me right. Besides,<br />it's the least I can do after you risked your lives to save me. Win-Win in my<br />book." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Good enough for me.<br />It's a viable option. What do you say Eta?"</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Fewer cameras to avoid at his place than the<br />hotels" she shrugged,” Better plan than any". </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">They wrapped up their<br />dinner, Chester waived to Albert on the way out, and the three headed to his<br />place. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Calibri&quot;,sans-serif; mso-fareast-language: EN-US; mso-hansi-theme-font: minor-latin;"><br clear="all" style="mso-special-character: line-break; page-break-before: always;" /><br /></span><br /><br /><br /><br /><div class="MsoNormal"><br /><br /></div><br /><h1><br /><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/null" name="_Toc458968201">New<br />Precognition</a><o:p></o:p></h1><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Chester gave them the grand<br />tour. “Kitchen is to the left. There is a Keurig<br />there if you drink coffee. There's also a<br />latte wand if you are the frills type.”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash is following just<br />behind her, she can feel his warmth after coming in from the cold. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">“Nope, not going there. Get<br />a grip girl.” She said under her breath.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Chester pointed to a big<br />room just off the landing, “The movie theater is set up with a touch screen<br />display menu, just scroll to the movie you want to see, and tap.”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">“Wait…” Eta said, “Did you<br />say Movie Theater?”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">“Yes, I did.” Chester shrugged. A grin barely escaped the corner of<br />his mouth, “If you close the doors you can turn the volume up as loud as you<br />want it. It's totally sound proof from the rest of the house." He smiled<br />big about that one. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">“Some house you got here<br />Chester.” Ash threw a glance at her, eyebrows raised.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">“Thanks. Follow me.”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Heading up the stairs, then<br />down the hall to the right, they passed several doors. Pointing to Ash,<br />"You can take the first door, and Eta, you can take the next one. Just so<br />you know, my working hours are just starting, so I'll most likely be asleep<br />when you two wake up. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Mi casa es Su' casa.<br />I’m usually up about mid-morning to noon. If you need a computer there is a<br />guest computer in the living room, and one in each bedroom. I'll let you get<br />settled, I'll be in my office on the third floor if anyone needs me." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Chester nodded and headed up the second flight of<br />stairs.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Who is this<br />guy?" Eta said.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"I don't know… but I<br />think we signed up for the wrong career." Ash said. "I'll see you in<br />the morning". </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Eta watched him head into<br />his room, and then opened the door to her own. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Room? A suite was more like<br />it. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">It had its own bathtub with<br />jets, and empty walk-in closet. She put her bag on the chaise, then laid across<br />the bed. "Wow, this is a really nice mattress too."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-no-proof: yes;"><v:shape id="Picture_x0020_14" o:spid="_x0000_i1033" style="height: 25.5pt; mso-wrap-style: square; visibility: visible; width: 75.75pt;" type="#_x0000_t75"><br /> <v:imagedata o:title="" src="file:///C:\Users\store\AppData\Local\Temp\msohtmlclip1\01\clip_image001.jpg"><br /></v:imagedata></v:shape></span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">As she laid on the bed, she had the sensation of floating...<br />Like she was on a raft in the middle of the sea.</span></i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Suddenly, she was not in the room anymore. She was floating<br />above the house. The wind was whipping through her, not around, but through. </span></i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">She wanted to see closer to the ground<br />and found herself floating to wherever she willed. </span></i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">At ground level, the light was still on in the house. Chester<br />was working on something. </span></i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">She thought of Ash and<br />found herself floating through the windows, doors, walls, and into his room. </span></i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash was sitting on a chair, by the window. His hand under his<br />chin, as he stared outside. He seemed to be lost in thought. </span></i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">An image filled her mind. </span></i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">A tower. </span></i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Then she was whisked away<br />from the house and went flying through<br />the air. She was passing over houses at sonic speeds. She was tempted to put<br />her arms out like superwoman, but she was just along for the ride. </span></i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">As her flight slowed, she came upon a gated compound. There was<br />a manicured lawn at the entrance and<br />private security. </span></i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Multiple buildings on the property, but the most interesting<br />was a large tower, 13 stories tall. </span></i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">At the top of the tower, a light was on through a corner<br />window. </span></i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Eta floated to the top of the building, and saw a man with<br />white hair, writing something in a notebook on his desk. He turned and looked<br />in her direction, but he didn't see her. He just stared outside while he spoke<br />into his Bluetooth headset. </span></i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Floating down, and then backward, she was hurled through the<br />night, back into her room. </span></i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt;
