font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Eta glanced at the clock,<br />it's 11:02 am. She overslept. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Overslept is an<br />overstatement when you have no plans, but she felt like it was oversleeping. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">She dressed in a hurry and<br />worked her way down the hall. The smell of food carried her down the stairs and<br />around the corner. Ash was flipping pancakes and stirring sausage. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Chester was sitting at the<br />counter talking… then he turned around to see Eta walk in. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Hey. I'm not normally<br />awake quite this early, but Ash discovered cookware, and I followed the scent downstairs. I didn't even remember that stuff<br />was in there!" </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"I'm glad he found it,<br />I'm starving." Eta gave a nod to Chester<br />and sat down at one of the bar stools. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash turned to her,<br />"You OK Slugger? I heard you tossing and turning a bit last night." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Yeah, I'm<br />alright.&nbsp; But…"</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash turned back to her.<br />"What is it?" </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"I had another<br />one." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Really? What about<br />this time?"</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Eta glanced at Chester and<br />hesitated.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"It's OK…I trust him.<br />I had a buddy run a background on our friend here. No offense Chester."<br />Chester smiled and waved it off, mouth full of coffee, "And it turns out<br />that Chester's security clearance is almost as high as ours"</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Eta gave Chester a glance.<br />"OK, what do you do? Exactly, I mean?"</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"A little of this, a<br />little of that." Chester laughed. "Here's the thing." Chester<br />pulls out his business card and hands it to Eta. "Internet Data and<br />Program Security Analyst - Chester Jandihar<br />IDAPSA Consultant".</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Wow", she said,<br />rolling the title in her mouth silently.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Yeah, it's a<br />mouthful. But CEO's get all freaked out when you call yourself a Hacker, so the<br />business title makes them feel better. Basically, I design programs of various<br />kinds for businesses, non-profits, even the government. I also test systems for<br />vulnerabilities and report my findings. Then in my free time, I just build random stuff, programs mostly." Chester<br />shrugged, "So as I said, a little of this, and little of that." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash smiled, "He's a<br />regular consultant for the N.S.A."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Eta raised an eyebrow in<br />disbelief. "If you say so…" Eta began to recant the visions she'd<br />been having to catch Chester up to speed. Then the most recent vision, detail<br />for detail, as best as she could remember it. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"You must think we're<br />both nuts… huh?" Eta asked. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Actually."<br />Chester mused, "I find this fascinating. We've been studying this kind of<br />phenomenon for years." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"You have?" Eta<br />turned to give her full attention. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Well… We as in those<br />in the science and technology field. Not me personally." Chester pulled up<br />his tablet and starting scrolling through<br />files. "I've worked on a lot of wicked crazy projects, for a lot of organizations.<br />I can say that some of them have researched the kinds of experiences Ash was<br />telling me about, yours too."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"This one…"<br />Chester handed the tablet to Eta who scrolled through the site. "… for<br />example. The Esion Eti'hw Institute &amp;<br />Research Facility. They pronounce that second word like ET-Heeu. I built some seriously intense stuff for<br />them. They're just the kind of people who dabble in your experiences. I<br />wouldn't use them, though, they give me<br />the heebeegeebees. Especially that main guy… what's his name. Thaddeus. I<br />finally turned the project over to some eager MIT brats. I couldn't work with<br />them anymore."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"What kinds of<br />projects? What's the research--" Eta took a quick breath. "The<br />tower." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Yeah," Chester<br />pointed to the picture, "that's their pride and joy there. Esion<br />Tower." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"No, you don't<br />understand, my vision, I was at that tower last night." She recounted her<br />vision to them.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"The white haired man<br />had to be this guy" Chester took the tablet, navigated to the about page,<br />and handed it back. "Thaddeus J. B. Rotcudnoc, say that ten times<br />fast." he laughed. "I think he said it's Slavic."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Eta could feel the hair raise<br />up on the back of her neck. “That’s him!”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">“I knew it…” Chester said,<br />“… heebeegeebees. You two better watch yourselves if he’s involved in this.<br />Here, read the about page.”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Eta read opening out-loud:</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Have you ever wondered what is just beyond this world?<br />Have you thought there had to be more? Religion and Spiritualists have let you<br />down? Turn to science. Our work in quantum mechanics and extra-dimensional evolution is providing solid scientific answers to many of life's<br />oldest questions. The Esion Eti'hw Institute was founded on the groundbreaking principals outlined in the<br />thesis 'Unlocking the Extra-Normal Mind. A study of the human mind’s unlocked<br />potential', By Dr. Richard T. Briar." </span></i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Sounds freaky."<br />She said, "Just like the rest of the kooks<br />I've been reading about the last few weeks.”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Wait… did you say, Dr. Briar? Let me see that." Ash<br />grabbed the tablet out her hand. He scrolled to the bottom and stopped. His<br />brow furrowed, and lips pursed. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"What's the problem?<br />You look like you just drank bad milk." Eta observed. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"The night before the<br />attack, this guy sat across from me at the coffee shop. He was asking a bunch<br />of weird questions about my fight with the homeless guy. It was almost as if he<br />knew I had seen something. I just passed it off at the time. I had forgotten<br />about him until just now."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"So, you have a strange encounter where you see something that<br />wasn't there… theoretically…" Chester interjected, "… then this guy<br />shows up asking questions. Later that night you are attacked by the 'League of<br />Assassins'. Then last night, Eta has a Vision of Thaddeus at the tower. Yep, I<br />knew that place gave me the creeps, and you two are in it deep." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Eta could feel her skin<br />tighten, and heat rising up in her throat. "So what does this mean?"</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash put his plate in the<br />sink, "I have no idea, but I need to get some answers. I'm going to do<br />some field reconnaissance. You two be alright for a few hours?" </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Sure," Eta said.<br />"I'll clean my guns. I have a feeling I'll be needing them." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Cool! You can set all<br />of that up here on the counter. I'll start checking too, see what they've been<br />up to since I stopped working with them. See?” Chester grinned, “I knew I was<br />here for a reason." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">He's cute, a little young<br />for her taste. Well... He's not that young. Shake it off girl... </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Calibri&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 11.0pt; mso-ansi-language: EN-US; mso-ascii-theme-font: minor-latin; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; mso-bidi-language: AR-SA; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-bidi; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Tempus Sans ITC&quot;; mso-fareast-language: EN-US; mso-hansi-theme-font: minor-latin;"><br clear="all" style="mso-special-character: line-break; page-break-before: always;" /><br /></span><br /><br /><br /><br /><div class="MsoNormal"><br /><br /></div><br /><h1><br /><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/null" name="_Toc458968202">Reconnaissance</a><o:p></o:p></h1><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash rode the Vulcan to a<br />military surplus store and restocked a<br />few items he thought he would need. He also picked up two uniforms to match the<br />security in the website photos. He threw them into the saddle bag and hopped on. The purr of the motor and vibration running through his body<br />was calming, as all bike rides were. He turned west onto the I-10, then headed<br />north on PCH up to Malibu.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash could not get the image<br />of the alley, and the large man behind<br />Chester, out of his mind. The things he often saw on people, the medication<br />he'd been taking for hallucinations. Now it turns out he might not be crazy<br />after all? Or maybe he still was. Nothing has been right since he left.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">After a few turns on less<br />populated roads, he arrived at the Esion Eti'hw Institute &amp; Research<br />Facility, Malibu, CA. The property was large, with several buildings in the<br />center, and a long drive from the front gate. One large tower dominating the<br />rest. They weren't just going to just let him in, so he drove past the front<br />gate, and parked down the road, behind a city welcome sign. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">He worked his way through<br />brush and sand hills and plopped down on<br />a hill near some of the buildings. He saw hundreds of people coming and going<br />throughout the facility. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Then he sensed he too was<br />being watched. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash put down his binoculars<br />and turned his head to the left. A large man, one of the two from the alley<br />where they met Chester, was laying next to him. He was dressed in all white,<br />with a goofy grin on his face. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">He nodded and stood up,<br />then motioned for Ash to follow. They walked right up to the edge of the gate,<br />and the man stepped through the fence as though it were not solid. He motioned<br />for Ash to follow. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash tentatively put his<br />hand out and pushed right through the<br />fence. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">The man walked right up to<br />a guard that was walking by, and purposefully stood in his way. The look on his<br />face was that of a child playing a game. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">The man walked through him and put his hand out to Ash. He couldn't<br />hear him, and he didn't open his mouth, but he felt the man say "After<br />you". </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">They walked together,<br />inspected labs, took a trip into the elevator, up to the CEO's office on the<br />top floor. The two continued to walk side by side, people moving right through<br />them. The large man was always at ease<br />but never spoke. They approached the large double doors to the office and stopped. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">A plaque was hung<br />prominently on the red oak, "Thaddeus J. B. Rotcudnoc, Chief Executive<br />Officer.” </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash looked to his guide for<br />direction, and with a wave of his hand, he understood "After you.” Ash<br />tried to open the door knob, but his hand went through the door, so he<br />half-stepped half-fell through the doorway. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">After regaining his<br />balance, he shot a glance back to his silent companion, who was belly laughing,<br />bent over, and pointing at him. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Funny..." He<br />shot back. "Michael? Gabriel?"</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">The Guide stood a little<br />straighter, big smile, but shook his head no. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Fine. I shall call<br />you..." Ash searched for a fitting name. "Bob. That way I can say<br />'Bob did it' and actually be talking about someone." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">The Guide cocked his head<br />to one side, and somewhat to Ash's surprise, he gave an enthusiastic nod to the<br />affirmative and smiled again. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"OK Bob, what are we<br />doing here?"&nbsp; Ash followed his gaze.<br /></span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">The office was large,<br />bigger than most homes. Bookshelves lined<br />the walls on both sides, a conference area was set up front. In the back,<br />behind a half wall, was a desk. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"That desk may as well<br />have been a dining room table in its former life,"<br />Ash said.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">The two of them walked<br />through to the back of the office, where a tall thin man, in a tailored suit,<br />was talking into the window. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">His tuft of white hair nearly glowed in the reflection. A blue<br />tooth perched perfectly upon his ear complimented his square jaw. He was an<br />older man but fit. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">He was not just accompanied<br />by a single creature, as with so many others, he was nearly covered in them.<br />They moved in and out of him. A mist covered his ankles, and two creatures,<br />larger than the others, stood by each side. Thaddeus may not have noticed Ash's<br />presence, but the two creatures were not pleased. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Each was nearly 9-foot<br />tall, with the head of a bull, and white paint swiped across their chest. They<br />snorted at Bob, who returned with a smile and wave,<br />not in the least concerned. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash backed a little closer<br />to Bob, but followed him to the desk, and stood by the window on the opposite<br />side of the room.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Thaddeus wrapped up his conversation and sat at the desk. He put his<br />hand on the far edge, feeling the grooves<br />in the design. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">He paused. Turned back to<br />the window. Stared at Ash…</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash felt a cold tingle run through his spine. Could Thaddeus<br />see him?</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">He sniffed the air… tilted<br />his head… Shook his head and sighed.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">No. He was staring through<br />Ash. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Turning back, Thaddeus<br />inserted his pen into a small depression just to the edge of the desk. A door<br />revealed itself in the side panel, and inside was a notebook. Thaddeus's snow<br />white hair fell out of place as he bent down to pull it out. He stopped a moment<br />to fix it in a mirror that was stationed prominently on his desktop. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Then, Bob walked out of the<br />window, took ten steps on thin air, turned, and motioned for Ash to follow. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Despite the oddity of the<br />experience thus far, Ash felt his legs and arms cramp up at the thought of walking<br />out of the 13th-floor window. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Tentatively, he pushed his<br />hand through the glass. As with the door, and gate, it went straight through. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Bob waited, arms folded. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Was that a smirk on his<br />face?</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash took a half step through<br />the glass and found the air to be just as<br />solid as the carpet in the office. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Taking a deep breath, he<br />closed his eyes, and put his full weight on the foot, then took three more<br />steps with eyes closed. When he opened his eyes, they were standing on nothing.<br /></span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Bob took Ash's hand, and<br />then they floated, slowly down to the ground, stopping just shy of it. Floating<br />ten feet above the crowds head, they walked back to the motorcycle. The last<br />steps were like stairs, back to the ground floor. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Bob smiled again, and with<br />a bow, a bright light flashed, blinding Ash for a moment. When his eyes<br />adjusted, Bob was gone. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Somehow, Ash felt that he<br />wasn't really gone. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">He turned to continue the same<br />direction he'd ridden on the way in, so as not to pass the guard gate twice. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Turning off of Las Virgenes<br />Rd, he hooked back to LA on the 101. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Eta and Chester were never<br />going to believe this, Ash wasn't sure if he believed. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Calibri&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 11.0pt; mso-ansi-language: EN-US; mso-ascii-theme-font: minor-latin; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; mso-bidi-language: AR-SA; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-bidi; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Tempus Sans ITC&quot;; mso-fareast-language: EN-US; mso-hansi-theme-font: minor-latin;"><br clear="all" style="mso-special-character: line-break; page-break-before: always;" /><br /></span><br /><br /><br /><br /><div class="MsoNormal"><br /><br /></div><br /><h1><br /><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/null" name="_Toc458968203">The<br />Orphanage</a><o:p></o:p></h1><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"I have an appointment<br />to make, and this program will take a few hours to run." Chester took his<br />last sip of Mountain Dew and threw the<br />bottle in the recycle bin. "You are welcome to stay here and get some<br />rest. Or, you can come along if you'd like."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Eta glanced at the code<br />running in the background. "Sure" With a nod, she left a note for<br />Ash, and they grabbed their coats and headed out the door. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">In the car, Chester rambled on and on about The<br />Orphanage. "Ms. Wu is one of the most inspiring people I've ever met. She<br />was raised in mainland China. She was a third child and a female, but her<br />parents refused to abort her like the Chinese Government required, so she lived<br />without honor or privilege. Eventually, when she was 15, her parents sent her<br />to the USA hoping for a better life. She was mistreated by her ‘tour guides’,<br />but eventually broke free. Now she runs The Orphanage here in L.A." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Chester nodded to the<br />building. It was a nice place, more like a private university campus. "She<br />takes the ones that no one else will take. Many of her kids will spend the rest<br />of their childhoods here, some the rest of their lives."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">They parked, and walked in.<br />The entrance was beautiful, laid with quality white tile, and a marble<br />receptionist’s desk. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Hey Elaine",<br />Chester waved to the young lady, who<br />couldn't have been more than 17. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">She nodded, and smiled, but<br />then turned back to her telephone. "Yes,<br />sir, and what is the address?" </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Chester led her to the<br />common room. A library ran the length of one wall, with seating areas to read.<br />There were cubicle-style desks with<br />computers for homework and study, and a separate room to the side for games. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Hey Chester" A<br />young black girl waived from the computer area. "Whaz up?" </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Jazmin my young protégé,"<br />Chester walked over to her "Are you giving Ms. Wu a hard time?"</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Me? Never," she said with obvious sarcasm.<br />"I swear, the computer crashes are not my fault this time. I even tried to<br />fix it, but it's a nasty virus. Worse than any I've seen yet."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">She was an older kid, 16 or<br />17 maybe. Bright blue strands were weaved into her jet black braids. One<br />hundred ribbons waving in the wind when<br />she moved her head. She was a fit young lady, although it was hard to tell for<br />sure under loose jeans and a t-shirt. Eta hardly noticed at first, but her<br />right arm was skinnier than her left. Same length, but half the diameter. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Who's the<br />chick?" Jazmin asked Chester, and when she looked up Eta was taken back by<br />piercing gray eyes, almost silver. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"She's a friend,<br />Eta". </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Hm. She safe?" </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"She's safer than you know or need. Why? What kind of trouble are you<br />into now?"</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Nothing big, but this<br />guy has me worried a bit." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Chester and Eta looked down<br />at her screen. Black boxes, with green letters. "People still use these? I<br />haven't seen a chat room since 1997." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"It's the hackers<br />preferred method of communication. Anonymity is a top priority." Chester<br />said to Eta, turning to Jazmin, "Hey, is that an ARK room?"</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Yep."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"I thought I told you<br />to stay out away from ARK, they can be very dangerous." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"I'm sorry, ARK?"<br />Eta interrupted.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Anonymous Response Kings," Chester said. "They are a<br />Hacktivist group." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Is that special<br />branch of Anonymous?" </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"They are similar, but<br />not the same group. These guys are more prone to serious, often life-threatening, attacks. Not just the benign pranks<br />often pulled by Anonymous." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Where did you get<br />this girl?" Jazmin asked. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"She's not a hacker,<br />but she's safe. Trust me." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"I don't trust anyone,<br />that's how I stay alive. Besides," Jazmin pointed at the screen, "I'm<br />not hacking for them, just watching for activity. Surfing for<br />entertainment." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Eta looked down as Jazmin's<br />fingers ran the keyboard. "bds33s@ll" was next to the words flying<br />across her screen.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"So what's your<br />problem and with who?" Chester asked. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"This guy."<br />Jazmin pointed to the screen, where the name appeared as<br />"D@rkM@tt3r". </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"DarkMatter",<br />Chester said. "That's cute."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Well, he's not cute.<br />He's on the Jihad sections trying to stir up trouble makers. font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; There<br />is almost no chance he could be adopted anywhere now. Eta asked.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Well..." Chester<br />smiled sheepishly, "I was given a list of places I could use to fulfill<br />community service, and I threw darts at the wall. The first one stuck on this<br />place. What I didn't know, was how much Ms. Wu would mean to me. She treated me<br />like one of her troubled kids, and she was just as tough on me as them." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ms. Wu walked slowly passed<br />a few other kid and checked out their studies, then made her way to Chester and<br />Eta. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Ms. Wu, good to see you," Chester said as the woman<br />approached. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">She was small, maybe<br />4'9"? It was hard to say, but she looked like she was in her late 60's. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">After some introductions,<br />Ms. Wu turned to Eta, "Dear, I need this young man for a few minutes to<br />fix my computers. These kids keep downloading things.
