They<br />seemed to have everything from Honors World History to Sesame Street. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">She grabbed a book on US History and sat down in a nearby chair. She put<br />her feet up on the ottoman and leafed<br />through the historical photos.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">After a few minutes, a<br />young girl walked by the bookshelf and<br />sat down next to her.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Your pretty," she said, not looking up from her<br />book. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Her speech was odd. Not<br />Down Syndrome, but maybe Autism, Eta thought. "Thank you" Eta<br />replied. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"You have<br />dreams..." Yours come true." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Back at the house, Chester<br />was working on one side of the counter, and Eta sat on the other side.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"You know the problem<br />with these MIT brats?" Chester smirked. "They are way too sure of<br />themselves. They are so convinced that they're the smartest kid in the room,<br />and everyone has to answer to them. They've never had to make it on their own or do their own work. They get sloppy in<br />their life and sloppy in their code... and…<br />that's how I just got in." He slapped the desk next to the keyboard, quite<br />self-satisfied.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Chester… if you don't<br />mind me asking…" Eta kept her head down clearing the barrel of her Beretta<br />9mm. "How does someone with your obvious talent end up teaching computers<br />for dummies at a homeless shelter, and hanging out with orphans? </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Well, it's a long<br />story, but not I'm not sure it's a terribly interesting one... I was one of the<br />youngest graduates of Caltech to date, I was working with a major IT firm all<br />bright eyed, ready to change the world. Then I started to realize that all I<br />was doing was making really ugly people a lot of money. So I started drinking,<br />then came the drugs.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Soon I couldn't code<br />anymore so I lost my job. My parents couldn't bare the fact their son turned<br />into an addict, so they stopped returning my telephone calls. I ended up doing<br />things I'd rather forget. You met the gang…"</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Chester paused for a sip of<br />coffee, "One day, standing in front of a judge I was told I could take<br />jail or A.A plus community service. So, I chose A.A. and service. I had nowhere<br />to go, but a guy at one of the meetings told me about the Union Gospel Mission.<br />So I stayed there… every night for months.”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">“After a while, I started to notice how badly the place<br />needed new computers, but they couldn't budget them in. I made a few calls to<br />an old professor I knew at Caltech, and he sent me all the parts I needed to<br />build new computers, custom made for the shelter. They had never seen so many<br />computers in one place, and so high end. They were afraid they'd get stolen. I<br />showed them how to lock them down, and use them.“</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">“Eventually, I migrated from resident to volunteer, and then<br />honorary staff."&nbsp; I create code and<br />do odd projects for money, and I make enough in my spare time to live better<br />than most people, so I spend most of my time helping people down at the<br />mission.”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">“Consulting for the N.S.A.<br />gave me a big break back into the world of coding professionally. I work for<br />them, my record disappears (and so do any news articles about it). Eta<br />asked.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Baby Doe Sees All.<br />She was found crying in a dumpster after a botched late term abortion. Jazmin was<br />the name Ms. Wu gave her, but the Baby Doe became something she latched on<br />to." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"That's so sad." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Sad, but too common.<br />Planned Parenthood is nothing the media makes them out to be. They were founded<br />by hard-core racists as a form of population control. Their stated goal was to kill black babies, so they don't grow up<br />to be black adults. That's why you see more Planned Parenthood clinics in<br />minority neighborhoods than anywhere else. Something else people don't know is<br />how many mothers either die or are<br />permanently injured at those clinics. If a few black mothers get hurt in the<br />genocide, who's going to notice? That's their plan anyway." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"How is that possible?<br />Everyone talks about how much good they do. How can people not know this?"<br /></span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Politicians and Media<br />are paid well to keep it out of the press. It's a low-class slaughter house, pretending to be a 'women's health<br />clinic'. Jazmin's arm was hurt when the doctor who barely made it through grad<br />school botched the abortion. He did not even get a charge pressed against him.<br />They are worse than Al Capone ever was. A few of us Hacktivists have started<br />attacking their websites, shutting them down, publishing secret records, etc.<br />We're starting to turn the tide, but only just barely." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">-bds33s@ll: “I've been in<br />your hack for hours, but you were boring me with the long hand. So I thought<br />I'd help. But I want half the prize money this time." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">-r@0stedch35tnts: “There is<br />no prize money. This is a serious hack.”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">-bds33s@ll: “If you say so.<br />I guess I’ll still help, but prize money would be better.”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">-r@0stedch35tnts: “I<br />suppose it could be done faster this way. Only this once."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Pardon me a moment, this<br />part will take some concentration working with two." Chester's' fingers were flying again. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">It's amazing how fast the kid’s<br />fingers could type. The girls were faster. The two of them ebbed and flowed<br />through the code like a dance. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">This kid could type in his<br />coding language, faster than Eta could think in English. Chester was something<br />else. She called him “kid”, but he wasn’t that much younger than her. Not bad<br />on the eyes either.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">As he was distracted with<br />code, she wandered the room studying his life. You can never turn off the soldier, or the spy. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Besides, even pointless<br />analysis of the contents of his bookshelf was better than the thoughts of what<br />might be happening to her own mind. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Insanity was creeping just<br />outside the door. She could feel its cold presence. No. She's not allowing<br />herself to think that way. She must stay focused. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Even if that means<br />distracting herself with "Quantum Mechanics for Mathematicians by Leon A.<br />Takhtajan". Really? Who is this guy?! Eta looked out the window and<br />watched some birds pecking in the yard…</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Hey, this is<br />interesting." Chester waived her over.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Calibri&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 11.0pt; mso-ansi-language: EN-US; mso-ascii-theme-font: minor-latin; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; mso-bidi-language: AR-SA; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-bidi; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Tempus Sans ITC&quot;; mso-fareast-language: EN-US; mso-hansi-theme-font: minor-latin;"><br clear="all" style="mso-special-character: line-break; page-break-before: always;" /><br /></span><br /><br /><br /><br /><div class="MsoNormal"><br /><br /></div><br /><h1><br /><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/null" name="_Toc458968206">The<br />Tower</a><o:p></o:p></h1><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-no-proof: yes;">Hopefully,</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;"> the Intel Chester gave<br />them was still current. Combined with his half-real<br />visit the other day, Ash was feeling confident at least. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Chester can only hack<br />computers, not notebooks. So if Ash's "trip" was accurate they needed<br />that notebook. Eta had seen him writing in it the night before, so that was two<br />confirmations.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash told Eta and Chester<br />that he had the surreal walk through, and about the notebook, but he left out<br />the part about his having a companion or guide. That just seemed… too weird to talk about just yet.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">They left Ash's Vulcan at<br />Chester's place. Just in case someone spotted them, they could not risk having<br />it tied back to Ash through registration tags. An Uber dropped them off in a<br />tourist town nearby, they selected a store as a regroup point if things went<br />sideways.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">They worked their way<br />through the sand and brush under cover of night to get to the Esion Eti'hw<br />Institute. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">They rested and watched for<br />a few minutes. Ash was half expecting another visit, but when nothing happened,<br />he decided to press forward.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">The compound didn't seem<br />heavily guarded at the time, Ash knew that missing personnel would just trigger<br />the alarm. She’s not<br />sleeping well, he thought to himself. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; Hopefully, the cameras were already looped,<br />they'd have to rely on Chester to complete that part of the mission. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">They didn't want to risk<br />breaking radio silence to confirm. If he saw them heading into a trap, he'd<br />break silence to alert them.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">As they entered the main<br />floor of the office suite they checked infrared and found no motion detectors<br />in the immediate area. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Eta made quick work of the<br />office doors, and they were both inside. It was just as he remembered in his...<br />visit? </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">They made their way to the<br />back of the room, and Eta walked up to the windows. "So... You just stepped<br />out. Huh?" </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"I'm not sure I'd do<br />that again, under normal circumstances, but yep. Just walked right out."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"That had to be a<br />vision or dream right? It didn't really happen?" She pressed her gloved<br />hand against the glass and pressed a little.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash felt along the edge for the depression the CEO had used earlier.<br />"I don't know. It felt real, I wasn't sleeping before or after. What is a<br />vision anyway? I'm no theologian or philosopher, but I felt like I was really<br />here." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Still, real or not,<br />stepping out of a perfectly safe building... Not gonna<br />lie." Ash pressed the area, and the side popped out with a hiss."<br />Found it... Shoot!"</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"What?" </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"It's empty."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Well, that sucks... It<br />would be a tight race, but it was the plan B they had discussed. They kept the footfalls as silent as possible as they made<br />their way back up the stairs, trying to keep an ear on the guards below, and<br />not alert them to their presence.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; The room always started out so bright. The white room.<br />White walls, cold metal, hissing from overhead... the familiar dream, the dream<br />he'd had every night for eight years now... The dark room would be next. He<br />hated the dark room. But the white room wasn't so bad, except for that<br />incessant hissing.</span></i><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><h1><br /><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/null" name="_Toc458968207">The<br />Escape</a><o:p></o:p></h1><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Eta ran for all her legs<br />would carry her, three guards were behind her. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">She was losing them, she<br />could outrun these mall cops any day. Up ahead she saw the 12<sup>th</sup>-floor door open, and one came<br />toward her. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Running time was over for<br />the moment. She'd have to stand her ground against this one, and the three<br />behind. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">She saw the Taser flash,<br />she side swiped and it made no contact. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; Should she stand against these four or had she thrown<br />them off enough to regain her lead? </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Nope. One had gotten passed<br />the others without losing momentum.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; She couldn't worry about Ash right now. He could<br />handle himself. If he'd been caught, she couldn't help him if she were caught<br />too. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Up the stairs, out the<br />access door to the roof. She pulled her sidearm<br />and fired three rounds into the padlock and landed a good jump kick into the<br />door, which flew open before her. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">She tore a piece of her<br />jacket and let it hang on a bolt near the top of the emergency exit ladder. She<br />then threw the jacket down the side of the building. It caught the wind and landed out toward the edge of the<br />field. They would hunt her down in the fields, while she went another way.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; There were even two helicopters searching the fields further out.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Helicopters? Man, security<br />is tighter here than we thought.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; In two minutes she was driving up the on-ramp toward the I-10. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">She needs to break radio<br />silence, but not yet, not until she was sufficiently out of range. margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">The door opened, and in<br />walked a small bald man in a lab coat. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Dr. Briar."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Good morning Captain<br />Ashland. It's nice to have you back among us. You took a pretty nasty fall last<br />night, and put three of my guards in the hospital."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Glad I could<br />help." Ash Smiled.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Always make sure your<br />captor knows you are in charge. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Dr. Briar returned the<br />smile. "It seems you and I have some unfinished business. As soon as we<br />track down your friend, we'll have questions for her too. My best head hunters<br />are looking for her now.” </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">He placed a file on the<br />desk. “Tell me, Captain, how much do you remember about me?"</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Call me Ash. You are<br />Dr. Briar, we met outside the cafe in Oregon, and you smell like peppermint<br />candy."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Yes, all true. But<br />how about before that time at the coffee shop, is there anything else you<br />remember about me?"</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"No. Just what I’ve<br />read about you online. Should there be?"</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"We shall see." Dr. Briar pulled out some wires and pads.<br />"While you were out, you were injected with a serum of my own design. It<br />will help you be more forthcoming. I'm<br />simply going to attach these to you for monitoring. I promise it won't hurt. We<br />tried putting them on while you were out, but you kept sweating them<br />off...." He placed the pads on Ash's temples, neck, chest, and forearms. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Tell me, how long<br />have you been having these nightmares?"</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Are you my<br />psychologist now?</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Let's just say that I<br />am an interested party."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"I get bad dreams,<br />left over from the war. Not that it's any of your business."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Dr. Briar continued to<br />press with question after pointless question. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash found it to be the<br />oddest interrogation he has ever been aware of. Not once did Dr. Briar ask him<br />why he broke in, or what he hoped to accomplish, or what he had done while in<br />the facility. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">He just kept pressing him<br />with questions about his life, habits, and preferences in food. If he was<br />trying to bore him into slipping up and giving an important detail, it just<br />might work.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">It was the kind of small<br />talk Ash always tried to avoid in normal life, and yet he was tied to a chair.<br />So he could either answer these pointless questions<br />or say nothing.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">He was pretty sure that<br />nothing was a bad option because they'd<br />probably put him back away for a while. He would use this opportunity to<br />counter-interrogate. So he kept Dr. Briar talking while he answered the Life<br />Survey.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">After what felt like hours<br />of incessant questioning, but the clock assured him it was only 45 minutes, Dr.<br />Briar placed is pen on top of his notebook, and leaned back into the chair. His<br />eyebrows furrowed, and the skin around his fat nose wrinkled.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash, sat back in his chair and let the urge to break his own thumbs<br />to escape the handcuffs pass for a moment.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">The door was still locked,<br />and he didn't want to risk killing the good Doctor. He was most definitely<br />someone who could not be trusted, but he wasn't yet sure he needed to die. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Not yet anyway. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">A bright flash, Ash closed<br />his eyes. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">When his vision cleared,<br />the Doctor was still sitting, staring at his notebook. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Bob was now standing behind<br />him, smiling again. He walked over to the desk, and leaned down, staring up at<br />Dr. Briar. His smile faded slightly, and he shook his head. Bob stood again and nodded to Ash.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Without any audible words,<br />Ash felt him say "Play along".</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Bob put his finger on the<br />notebook that held the good doctor's attention and pulled it ever so slightly across<br />the desk toward Ash. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"What are you reading<br />there Doc?" He decided to play along.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"How-?" Dr. Briar<br />cut himself off. "How are you doing this?" </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"I'm not doing<br />anything." Ash didn't want to lie, per say. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"What were you<br />thinking just now, while I was reading?"</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"I was just bored of<br />the silence, and wondering what you were reading... Hence my question."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"But how did you move<br />the notebook?"</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Move the<br />notebook?" Ash raised his voice in feigned shock at the suggestion.<br />"I did no such thing. I'm sitting over here. Are you feeling<br />alright?"</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">The good doctor stood up and stood next to Ash. "I want you to<br />think about that notebook, just like you were a moment ago. Think with all your<br />mind how you want to read it."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"OK, whatever you say<br />doc." Ash squinted at the notebook, fighting back a grin.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Bob nudged the book half<br />way across the desk. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"My goodness... keep<br />going". </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash kept squinting, Bob<br />picked the notebook off the desk, floated it into the air, the slowly carried<br />it over to Ash. Inch by inch, he brought it over.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash felt this was the<br />stupidest parlor trick he'd ever seen, but then if he could not see Bob, it<br />would be quite a different show.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Dr. Briar took a step back,<br />behind Ash, holding his breath.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Bob placed the notebook gently<br />on Ash's lap.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Astonishing-"<br />Dr. Briar let out. "I must get the readings. I have to go... Uh... Don't<br />go anywhere." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"I'm handcuffed to a<br />chair?"</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Yes. Right." Dr.<br />Briar grabbed the notebook and half walked, half tripped over his own feet as<br />he ran out of the door, leaving Ash alone in the rectangular white room.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Bob looked very pleased<br />with himself.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash let out a little laugh.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Calibri&quot;,sans-serif;
