mso-fareast-language: EN-US; mso-hansi-theme-font: minor-latin;"><br clear="all" style="mso-special-character: line-break; page-break-before: always;" /><br /></span><br /><br /><br /><br /><div class="MsoNormal"><br /><br /></div><br /><h1><br /><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/null" name="_Toc458968209">Change<br />of plans</a><o:p></o:p></h1><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Dr. Briar sits at the<br />monitor, reviewing the footage, watching as they place Ash in the chair, and cuff<br />him in place. Similar setting to when he first met him.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-no-proof: yes;"><v:shape id="Picture_x0020_18" o:spid="_x0000_i1029" style="height: 25.5pt; mso-wrap-style: square; visibility: visible; width: 75.75pt;" type="#_x0000_t75"><br /> <v:imagedata o:title="" src="file:///C:\Users\store\AppData\Local\Temp\msohtmlclip1\01\clip_image001.jpg"><br /></v:imagedata></v:shape></span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Thaddeus, we cannot push him any further, he's already been in<br />the room longer than most others, and his vitals are dangerously out of<br />control. We must put an end to this test… or give him a rest and start again. </span></i><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"You Dr. Briar, like these experiments, are temporary and<br />expendable… you would do well to remember that."</span></i><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">A chill crept over his spine, from his tailbone, up his neck, and into his head... His skin became cold as<br />the realization dawned on him… He was never the one in control. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">When he'd brought Thaddeus on, he'd been so hungry for the<br />financial backing and the seeming eagerness that he showed in the project, he'd<br />never stopped to consider that Thaddeus would take over. </span></i><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"…I'll be in the observation lounge that I paid so much<br />money to build. The Air Force needs results. If we lose him, I will handle it.<br />Proceed." Thaddeus stepped out of the room<br />and walked down the hall.</span></i><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Dr. Briar slumped into his chair with the realization… he'd<br />sold his science, his soul, to this partnership. Without this financial<br />backing, he'd have to pull out and stop everything. Shameful though it may be,<br />the scientist in him was curious to see what would happen if he pushed the<br />patient over the edge. </span></i><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">So he turned back to the monitor, and kept one eye on the<br />vitals, then turned pushed the slider one notch higher. "It's beginning...<br />the biometrics just spiked."</span></i><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Good." The answer was curt. </span></i><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">The previous test subjects had nowhere near the discipline that<br />Ash did. This should be an interesting observation. He'd been incredible so<br />far. Getting a trained military man, accustomed to being alone for days and<br />weeks, a survival expert. He had already outlasted every scientist, street<br />volunteer, and audio geek they had run<br />through the tests. Many of them didn't make it through the prep room, but they<br />never had anyone last this long, he'd been in there for three days and now he's<br />starting to show signs of a dimensional tear.</span></i><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"You are a genius!” Dr. Briar spoke into the observation<br />lounge speaker.</span></i><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Yes, Dr. Briar I am! That is why you brought me<br />here."</span></i><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">&nbsp;Thaddeus replied.<br />"To fix this reject project and bring something valuable out of it. Keep<br />me appraised of any changes, I'm leaving for now." </span></i><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Dr. Briar could see through the window as the black suited man<br />turned and left the room. His tuft of white hair bouncing along as he walked<br />away.</span></i><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></i></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-no-proof: yes;"><v:shape id="Picture_x0020_19" o:spid="_x0000_i1028" style="height: 25.5pt; mso-wrap-style: square; visibility: visible; width: 75.75pt;" type="#_x0000_t75"><br /> <v:imagedata o:title="" src="file:///C:\Users\store\AppData\Local\Temp\msohtmlclip1\01\clip_image001.jpg"><br /></v:imagedata></v:shape></span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">That was 8 years ago, the<br />beginning of the end of his life. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Now he was still here,<br />cleaning up the mess his Benefactor had left him with. Dr. Briar watched the<br />vital signs on the monitor, much more advanced than the ones they used on Ash's<br />first visits. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">They now used a bio-implant chip. It could be placed as a sub-dermal,<br />nothing more than an insect bite to the unaware patient. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Thanks to the fight last<br />night, they were able to put one in Ash's arm, disguised in the patch up they<br />did of the existing cut. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Hopefully, he'd never know<br />it was there.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">He slowly pushed up the<br />fader labeled, "White Noise". </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">It was a bit of a misnomer,<br />as white noise is an even amount of each frequency, and this was adjusted to<br />their purposes, but it came through as a hissing sound nevertheless. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash was stirring, he'd be<br />awake soon. He would go and complete the mission. His stomach turned at the<br />thought.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">The phone chirped, and he<br />picked it up. "Dr. Briar speaking."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"It's Thaddeus. Are<br />you positive you cannot find the Problem Child without him?"</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Yes, I'm sure. We've<br />tried everything, he's evaded us at every turn. We need EH's to find an EH.<br />Col. Ashland has shown exceptional promise, the most impressive we've<br />seen." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Very well, he may<br />still be of some use to us. He will need..." Thaddeus paused. "...<br />Motivation."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Dr. Briar's stomach<br />tightened.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; page-break-before: always;" /><br /></span><br /><br /><br /><br /><div class="MsoNormal"><br /><br /></div><br /><h1><br /><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/null" name="_Toc458968210">Regroup</a><o:p></o:p></h1><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Two hours passed since she<br />had left the Tower. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Eta was feeling the intense<br />pressure to get back to Chester and make a game plan. Her training told her to<br />make sure she wouldn't be followed first. She'd borrowed a car from Denny's parking lot. She'd driven in the wrong<br />directions for several miles, making frequent turns, watching for familiar<br />faces or vehicles... after an hour she was sure she wasn't followed, or found.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">She parked the car at a<br />different Denny's, placed the keys into an envelope with some cash (enough to<br />buy a better car), and put it on the floor board by the pedals. She called an<br />anonymous tip from a pay phone. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">With luck, the Police would<br />have the car before the owner knew it was missing. She'd wiped it down for<br />prints and evidence.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Five minutes later, the<br />Metro Bus took her to the Metro Rail. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">That was four hours ago when she arrived at Union Station. She'd<br />walked from there. The car they had rented was in a safe place, it was rented<br />under an assumed name, so the Institute shouldn't be able to find it. They'd<br />have to go back for it when it was safe<br />unless Ash could get to it without being seen.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">When she walked up to<br />Chester’s place and stepped in, she could hear him typing away. </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">He turned around in relief.<br />"Oh man! I'm so glad you are safe!"</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"I am, but I think<br />they have Ash. I came back here to regroup<br />and re-gear, then I'm headed back up there."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Actually, Ash wasn't<br />the one I was worried about. You were the one I was worried about..." </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">He paused. His eyes were<br />not on her face. “Um. Nice outfit.”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Eta felt the skepticism<br />rise up, she could always feel it in her left eyebrow. Heat run up her neck.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">“How did you get here?”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">“The bus.”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Good choice.” Chester<br />had turned back to the computer. “It worked. I've tapped into every system they<br />have, and they don't know I'm inside. They have him in a room controlled by<br />electronic locks. These people obviously never considered a real cyber threat<br />after I left. All my back doors are still in place."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">The monitor showed Ash<br />strapped to an expensive looking chair, in the middle of a white room. His arms restrained with metal<br />cuffs.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"That room feels<br />familiar." She said, mostly to herself.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Now, I can work<br />miracles with systems, but there is nothing I can do about those cuffs."<br />Chester threw up his hands. "That is all up to--"</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">“What is it?”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">“Someone is re-writing my<br />code.”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">“Is that possible?”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">“Anything is possible, but<br />how did they find me in the system so quickly?”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">The screen went black. A<br />single message “bds33s@ll: Your session has been terminated.”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">“No… she thinks this is a<br />game. She has no idea what’s she just did!” Chester put his hands up in the<br />air, stood and started pacing.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">His face and neck became<br />red, he picks up his laptop and tossed it<br />against the wall. Shattering it into little pieces.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">“She put a virus into my<br />system while I wasn’t looking. That PC is dead. I have to go upstairs to Big<br />Bertha.”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">“Big Bertha?” Eta said,<br />“Really?”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Chester smiled again,<br />slightly, and shrugged. “It’s a monster machine. I need to hurry. I have no<br />idea what’s going on in there right now.”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"You monitor from<br />here. I'll stand by in case he needs a ride."</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"Where will you get<br />another ride?" Chester glanced back. “You took the last bus to get here,<br />no more lines running tonight.”</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">"I'll improvise."<br />Eta held up the new burner phones Chester had prepared just in case and waved it at him. Then turned around<br />and headed out the door.</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Calibri&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 11.0pt; mso-ansi-language: EN-US; mso-ascii-theme-font: minor-latin; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; mso-bidi-language: AR-SA; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-bidi; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Tempus Sans ITC&quot;; mso-fareast-language: EN-US; mso-hansi-theme-font: minor-latin;"><br clear="all" style="mso-special-character: line-break; page-break-before: always;" /><br /></span><br /><br /><br /><br /><div class="MsoNormal"><br /><br /></div><br /><h1><br /><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/null" name="_Toc458968211">Olive<br />Branch</a><o:p></o:p></h1><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">The Doctor ran out of the<br />room, very excited. font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;;">Ash still wasn't sure what<br />to think of this. The Tower checked out almost as expected, minus the missing<br />journal. But, why lead him here, just to get caught with no journal? So this<br />wasn't a hallucination, right? If this<br />wasn't, what do you call it? </span><span style="font-family: &quot;Book Antiqua&quot;,serif; font-size: 10.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: .0001pt;
